visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man with glasses and a black flat cap stands in front of a grey curtain. He wears a dark blue t-shirt with white 'ROOTS' lettering. He holds a white phone box containing a gold-colored smartphone with a triple-lens camera. Yellow and white text overlays appear at the bottom. (2) Close-up view of the gold smartphone's frame, showing a physical button and the textured metallic finish. (3) The man reappears, gesturing with his hands while speaking. A large graphic '推薦大家' appears over him. (4) A grid of four iPhone images in boxes is shown: Gold, Deep Blue, Silver, and Classic Black. (5) An image of a fifth color, 'Orange', is displayed in its box, with a hand moving towards it. (6) The man continues talking, pointing his fingers. Behind him, icons for various phone brands like Vivo, Oppo, and Realme are visible through a glass partition. (7) Screen diagrams showing the 'Dynamic Island' and 'Face ID' interface appear as the man explains design changes. (8) An animated explosion graphic with the text '每月一爆!' appears near the man's head. He points to an on-screen subscribe button graphic.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 3c有意思tim哥. [Logo]: 3ctim. [Logo]: miko 米可手機館. [Subtitle]: iPhone 17 Pro 新色曝光?! (2) [Subtitle]: 這顏色你買單嗎. (3) [Variety]: 推薦大家. (4) [Slogan]: 推薦大家買手機到米可. (5) [Subtitle]: 釋出一段iPhone 17 Pro的5種顏色. (6) [Variety]: 金色. [Variety]: 深藍色. [Variety]: 銀色. [Variety]: 經典黑. (7) [Variety]: Orange. (8) [Subtitle]: 介於橙色與銅色之間. (9) [Subtitle]: 類似兩色的混合. (10) [Subtitle]: 據傳會採用新的鋁合金框架. (11) [Subtitle]: 採用玻璃的設計. (12) [Subtitle]: 每月一爆!. (13) [Slogan]: 趕快先訂閱起來!

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator presenting to the camera.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The main character is a middle-aged male with short hair, wearing black-rimmed glasses, a black newsboy/flat cap, and a navy blue t-shirt with 'ROOTS' branding.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The primary background is a neutral grey curtain in a studio setting. Secondary background includes a blurred retail display with smartphone brand logos (Vivo, Oppo, Realme).

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a male voice speaking enthusiastically in Mandarin over a driving, upbeat electronic pop background track with a prominent synth bassline. The voice is clear and well-projected. (2) A sharp 'ding' SFX punctuates the mention of the iPhone 17 Pro colors. The BGM maintains a steady, high-tempo 4/4 beat. (3) A subtle 'whoosh' sound effect occurs during a visual transition between shots of the phone. The speaker's pitch rises when describing the 'Orange' color. (4) A short 'bubble pop' SFX sounds as the '推薦大家' graphic appears. The music continues without interruption, serving as a high-energy bed. (5) The speaker's volume increases and the speech rate accelerates as he delivers the call-to-action to subscribe and mentions the 'Monthly Explosion' segment. A 'sparkle' SFX marks the end of the video.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Information Display -> Analysis -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a tech news commentary piece intended to generate excitement and discussion around rumored new colors and design changes for the upcoming iPhone 17 Pro. It leverages a high-energy presenter and fast-paced editing to retain viewer attention while promoting the 'miko' mobile store.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct verbal recommendation ('推薦大家買手機到米可') and persistent logo overlays for 'miko' mobile shop.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-quality social media production with professional audio and graphics optimized for vertical viewing platforms.
